title: ranunculus millefolius subsp. millefolius
intro: Ranunculus millefolius subsp. millefolius, also known as Meadow Buttercup, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Meadow Buttercup include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, Meadow Buttercup is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
